subject: A massive eldrazi-type sea creature sprawled on a storm-wracked rocky shore, its body a grotesque fusion of fossil-skeleton and living flesh with numerous tentacles, open fang-filled mouths, and writhing appendages
description: A hulking eldrazi-horror creature occupies the rocky shore in the foreground. Its body resembles a corrupted trilobite or fish-fossil: a segmented dark exoskeleton-like frame with exposed pink-red visceral interior, multiple writhing tentacles extending in all directions, and at least two distinct fang-lined maw openings visible. A long serpentine neck-appendage with a toothed head arcs above the central mass. The creature appears to be pulling itself across the rocks or emerging from the sea. Rain falls visibly across the scene and dark storm clouds gather above crashing grey-blue waves. A smaller parasitic or related creature appears at lower left. The entire palette is dark — charcoal, deep teal, pink-red viscera, and wet black rock.
foreground: massive eldrazi creature on wet rocks, tentacles spread, fang mouths visible
background: storm-wracked ocean, crashing waves, dark storm clouds, rain
emotion: implacable alien menace — no readable emotion, pure predatory mass
